headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -72.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 183% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 129 quotes, including a massive 110 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today.
• This frustration spike sits in the middle of the historical range but represents a huge swing up from yesterday's near-zero level.
• Fears also rebounded sharply from yesterday's low, while optimism remains muted despite having many strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
